issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://billbill.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbillbill.com%2F) ### Comment > #概述 > 此问题由“拦截 ETag 和 If - None - Match 标头”功能造成，关闭后恢复正常。 > > ##已造成的问题（**以复现成功率，从高到低排序**） > 1. 非AD营销界面无法加载，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 2. 其他用户的个人空间无法加载。 > 3. 视频/直播加载失败，或相关功能（如评论、点赞）不可用，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 4. 视频刷新失败。 > 5. 主页加载失败。 > > ###附注 > 1. 已尝试使用AdGuard DNS 私人服务器，并对本地与服务器过滤日志进行审查。除部分域名被错误屏蔽外（*正式测试与审查前已加入白名单*），未发现过滤器问题。 > 2. 以下议题可能与此问题有关: > -#229486. > -#229490. > --AdGuardTeam/AdGuardDNS#1023 ``` Username: @Tayg2048 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/axsq1b76rs0kk04ggk0w8ows8cw8gkks4o3i37vkr4.jpg?nc=1)

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 22, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Evermore, It seems that the website admin started updating frequently its anti-adblock detection logic. It can lead what AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 cannot block/filter the anti-adblock script in the effective time.

Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 22, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Evermore, It seems that the website admin started updating frequently its anti-adblock detection logic. It can lead what AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 cannot block/filter the anti-adblock script in the effective time.

Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 22, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Evermore, It seems that the website admin started updating frequently its anti-adblock detection logic. It can lead what AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 cannot block/filter the anti-adblock script in the effective time.

Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 22, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Evermore, It seems that the website admin started updating frequently its anti-adblock detection logic. It can lead what AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 cannot block/filter the anti-adblock script in the effective time.

Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

labels.name: A: Problematic

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
emm...我仔细检查了一下，发现剩下的广告来源全部来自于直播，没有第三方广告。或许得考虑和抖音有关的域名。  
需要注意的是，我开启了强制路由LAN IP v4。这个功能可能发挥了作用。如果真是这样，在iOS上的广告屏蔽可能需要寻求其它方法。

issue.title: sophiaaccoladewest.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [NSFW] [https://sophiaaccoladewest.com/b8K/wLSnEG60KB9gpichc5J/6kST3GvJ7BE0xHZ1qf/DsG5/gn9bQ/rOnrtKkw79/SprXlUpTLK219UeGwu/WIK/vdzGWWp-2fBfotribo_/uNDe4Kz6mI/UFjpJP19o6hzA-pb/qaEm?psid=1831](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsophiaaccoladewest.com%2Fb8K%2FwLSnEG60KB9gpichc5J%2F6kST3GvJ7BE0xHZ1qf%2FDsG5%2Fgn9bQ%2FrOnrtKkw79%2FSprXlUpTLK219UeGwu%2FWIK%2FvdzGWWp-2fBfotribo_%2FuNDe4Kz6mI%2FUFjpJP19o6hzA-pb%2FqaEm%3Fpsid%3D1831) ### Comment > Hallo AdGuard Support, > > ich habe ein Problem mit unerwünschten Weiterleitungen in meinem Browser trotz aktivem AdGuard. > > Beim Öffnen von Webseiten mit eingebetteten Video-Player des VOE-Player auf Streaming-Seiten wird regelmäßig automatisch ein neuer Tab geöffnet. Dieser führt zur zufälligen Werbe-/Redirect-URL: > > https://sophiaaccoladewest.com/... > > Die URLs sind dynamisch und bestehen aus langen zufällig wirkenden Pfaden. Die Weiterleitung erfolgt unmittelbar beim Klick auf den Video-Player. > > Folgende Maßnahmen habe ich bereits getestet: > > Pop-up- und Weiterleitungsblocker im Browser aktiviert > AdGuard aktiv mit Standardfiltern > zusätzliche Blocklisten getestet > betroffene Domain manuell blockiert > > Trotzdem wird der neue Tab weiterhin geöffnet zwar nun leer in weiß aber AdGuard scheint den Tab nicht zuverlässig blockieren zu können, bevor er erzeugt wird. > > Ich nutze: > > Browser: Chrome (Desktop) ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/l8lvalq6s5wscgw8cwsg0w8kw4s4cwk36d7d41326e.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.14 MV3 System version: | `Linux x86_64` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 22, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Evermore, It seems that the website admin started updating frequently its anti-adblock detection logic. It can lead what AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 cannot block/filter the anti-adblock script in the effective time.

Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

issue.body:
